summary:
So the Sync method is on lines 115-127. Now let me replace it with a fixed version. First, let me create a backup and then patch it:

<tool_call>
<function=Bash>
<parameter=command>
cp wal.go wal.go.backup2
# Now I'll replace the Sync method with one that also writes to the .sync file
sed -i '115,127d' wal.go
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
